name: vibe-sentinel
description: Combined assumption gate, change-control contract, and Scope Guard enforcement for vibe-coding agents.

scripts.validate: node bin/assumption-gate.mjs check --root test/fixtures/valid-workspace && node bin/change-control.mjs check --contract skills/change-control-compiler/examples/valid-contract.json && node bin/scope-guard.mjs check --plan skills/scope-guard/examples/valid-plan.json
